name: Sinusitis
meta_description: Learn about sinusitis symptoms, causes, diagnosis, and treatment options. Find out when to seek medical care and lifestyle tips for managing sinus inflammation.
overview: Sinusitis is an inflammation of the sinuses, the air-filled cavities around the nasal passages. It can be acute or chronic, with symptoms including facial pain, congestion, and discharge.
diagnosis: Diagnosis typically involves a physical examination of the nasal passages and sinuses. Imaging tests like CT scans may be used for chronic cases. Nasal endoscopy can provide a detailed view of the sinus openings.
when_to_seek_care: Seek medical attention if symptoms last more than 10 days, worsen after improving, or include high fever, severe headache, or vision changes.
prevention: Prevent sinusitis by maintaining good nasal hygiene, managing allergies, staying hydrated, and avoiding smoke and other irritants.

name: Eczema
meta_description: Comprehensive guide to eczema (atopic dermatitis) including symptoms, causes, treatment, and management strategies for healthy skin.
overview: Eczema, also known as atopic dermatitis, is a chronic inflammatory skin condition characterized by itchy, red, and dry patches on the skin.
diagnosis: Diagnosis is typically clinical based on appearance and symptoms. A patch test may help identify specific triggers. Blood tests can rule out other conditions.
when_to_seek_care: Consult a dermatologist if symptoms are severe, infected, or not responding to home care. Seek emergency care for signs of infection like pus or fever.
prevention: Prevent flare-ups by keeping skin moisturized, avoiding known triggers, maintaining humidity, and managing stress.
prevalence: Affects about 10-20% of children and 1-3% of adults

name: Insomnia
meta_description: Understanding insomnia: causes, symptoms, treatments, and sleep hygiene tips for better sleep quality.
overview: Insomnia is a sleep disorder characterized by difficulty falling asleep, staying asleep, or getting restful sleep, despite adequate opportunity to sleep.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves sleep history, sleep diary, and possibly polysomnography. Mental health evaluation may be needed for underlying causes.
when_to_seek_care: Seek help if insomnia persists for more than 3 months, affects daily functioning, or is accompanied by other concerning symptoms.
prevention: Maintain good sleep hygiene, manage stress effectively, and address underlying health conditions promptly.
age_group: All ages, more common in adults

name: Migraine
meta_description: Learn about migraine headaches, including symptoms, triggers, treatment options, and prevention strategies.
overview: Migraine is a neurological condition characterized by recurrent, severe headaches often accompanied by nausea, sensitivity to light, and visual disturbances.
diagnosis: Diagnosis is clinical based on headache characteristics and symptoms. Imaging tests may rule out other causes like tumors or aneurysms.
when_to_seek_care: Seek emergency care for sudden, severe headaches, headaches after head injury, or headaches accompanied by neurological symptoms.
prevention: Prevent migraines by identifying triggers, maintaining healthy habits, and using preventive medications if prescribed.
prevalence: Affects about 15% of the global population

name: Anxiety
meta_description: Comprehensive guide to anxiety disorders: symptoms, types, causes, and effective treatment options.
overview: Anxiety is a normal response to stress, but when it becomes excessive or persistent, it can develop into an anxiety disorder that interferes with daily life.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves clinical interview and psychological evaluation. Screening tools may help assess anxiety levels.
when_to_seek_care: Seek help if anxiety is interfering with daily activities, relationships, or work. Emergency care for panic attacks or suicidal thoughts.
prevention: Manage stress effectively, maintain healthy lifestyle, practice mindfulness, and seek early intervention for emerging symptoms.

name: Diabetes
meta_description: Learn about diabetes types, symptoms, risk factors, diagnosis, and management strategies for healthy living.
overview: Diabetes is a chronic condition that affects how your body turns food into energy. There are two main types: Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves blood tests including fasting glucose, A1C test, and oral glucose tolerance test.
when_to_seek_care: Seek emergency care for symptoms of diabetic ketoacidosis (fruity breath, confusion) or hypoglycemia (shaking, sweating).
prevention: Prevent Type 2 diabetes by maintaining healthy weight, eating well, exercising regularly, and managing blood pressure.
age_group: Type 2 more common in adults over 45

name: Hypertension
meta_description: Understanding high blood pressure: causes, risk factors, symptoms, and effective management strategies.
overview: Hypertension, or high blood pressure, is a chronic medical condition where the pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated.
diagnosis: Diagnosis is made by measuring blood pressure over multiple visits. Ambulatory blood pressure monitoring may be used.
when_to_seek_care: Seek emergency care for severe hypertension (BP > 180/120) or symptoms like chest pain, confusion, or stroke.
prevention: Prevent hypertension by maintaining healthy lifestyle, regular check-ups, managing stress, and limiting sodium intake.
gender: Men more common under 65, women over 65

name: Asthma
meta_description: Comprehensive guide to asthma: symptoms, triggers, treatment options, and management strategies for better breathing.
overview: Asthma is a chronic respiratory condition characterized by inflammation and narrowing of the airways, causing difficulty breathing.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves spirometry testing, peak flow measurement, and allergy testing. Chest X-rays may rule out other conditions.
when_to_seek_care: Seek emergency care for severe asthma attacks: difficulty breathing, blue lips, or inability to speak.
prevention: Prevent asthma attacks by avoiding triggers, taking preventive medications, maintaining good lung health.
gender: More common in boys as children, women as adults

name: Arthritis
meta_description: Learn about arthritis types, symptoms, treatment options, and lifestyle strategies for managing joint pain.
overview: Arthritis refers to inflammation of one or more joints, causing pain, stiffness, and decreased mobility.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves physical examination, X-rays, blood tests, and sometimes joint aspiration.
when_to_seek_care: Seek help if joint pain is persistent, severe, or accompanied by fever, rash, or weight loss.
prevention: Prevent arthritis by maintaining healthy weight, exercising regularly, protecting joints from injury.
gender: Women more affected by rheumatoid arthritis

name: Depression
meta_description: Understanding depression: symptoms, types, causes, and effective treatment options for mental wellness.
overview: Depression is a mood disorder that causes persistent feelings of sadness and loss of interest in activities once enjoyed.
diagnosis: Diagnosis involves clinical interview and psychological evaluation. Screening tools like PHQ-9 may assist.
when_to_seek_care: Seek help if symptoms persist for more than 2 weeks, affect daily functioning, or include thoughts of suicide.
prevention: Maintain strong social connections, manage stress effectively, seek early intervention for emotional changes.
